_description: Tailwind + shadcn/ui primitives. Radix primitives under the hood, class-variance-authority for variants, tailwind-merge + clsx for className composition.

tailwind.colorTokens: background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring

patterns.spacing: Container: px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8 with max-w-screen-xl. Sections: py-12 md:py-16 lg:py-24. Stack gaps: gap-4 / gap-6 / gap-8.
patterns.typography: Font families via CSS variables (--font-sans, --font-heading). Heading scale: text-3xl/4xl/5xl with tracking-tight font-semibold. Body: text-sm / text-base with text-muted-foreground for secondary.
conventions: Use cn() from lib/utils for className composition (clsx + tailwind-merge)
Variants via cva() with size + variant slots
Icons from lucide-react — size via className h-4 w-4 etc.
Radix primitives mirror WAI-ARIA patterns — do not reinvent accessibility
Prefer composition via asChild over prop drilling
